description: Datalab hints attached to a model via ``model_config['json_schema_extra']``.

datalab_ui_hidden_fields.description: Inherited field names to hide from the UI for this item type.
datalab_ui_hidden_fields.title: Datalab Ui Hidden Fields

datalab_ui_color.description: Accent colour (CSS hex) used for this item type in the UI.
datalab_ui_color.title: Datalab Ui Color

datalab_section_title.description: Title of the default custom-fields card.
datalab_section_title.title: Datalab Section Title

datalab_base_type.description: Built-in type this derives from, when not inferable from the class hierarchy.
datalab_base_type.title: Datalab Base Type

title: DatalabModelExtra
